creator: nickc@corp.firstindustrial.com
text:
When attempting to build the pm3-base port as of 10/2/2000 (Makefile 1.7 2000/09/30 23:47:11) an error is received attempting to retreive the port source tar files.  The Makefile doesn't indicate where the new pm3-*-1.1.15 files are to be found.  As a result compilation cannot complete.   Example of make output follows:

Fix: 

Need makefile to reflect correct location of pm3-*-1.1.15 tarballs.
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to run make for the lang/pm3-base port.
